articles.title: GET COMPLIANT FAST AND ACCELERATE YOUR BUSINESS WITH VANTA
articles.summary: Vanta automates up to 90% of the evidence collection process for top frameworks like SOC 2, ISO 27001, ISO 42001, and HIPAA so you can close bigger deals and scale faster.

articles.title: Get started.
OPENAI DEEP RESEARCH AVAILABLE TO PAYING USERS
articles.summary: OpenAI has rolled out deep research to paying ChatGPT users. This system card details its safety protocols, including external red teaming, risk evaluations, and key mitigations implemented.

articles.title: CLAUDE'S EXTENDED THINKING MODE
articles.summary: Anthropic's extended thinking mode, introduced in Claude 3.7 Sonnet, allows the model to allocate more cognitive effort to complex problems and make its thought process visible for greater transparency and trust.

articles.title: QATAR SIGNS DEAL WITH SCALE AI TO USE AI TO BOOST GOVERNMENT SERVICES
articles.summary: Qatar signed a five-year deal with Scale AI to implement AI tools for improving government services, focusing on predictive analytics and automation. Scale AI plans to develop over 50 AI applications for Qatar to aid in streamlining operations. This move positions Qatar as a rising AI hub in competition with Saudi Arabia and the UAE.

articles.title: FLUX LORA COLLECTION
articles.summary: XLabs has trained a number of useful LoRAs on top of the powerful Flux model. The most popular is the realism model.

articles.title: EMBODIED EVALUATION BENCHMARK
articles.summary: EmbodiedEval is a comprehensive and interactive benchmark designed to evaluate the capabilities of MLLMs in embodied tasks.

articles.title: IMPLEMENTING CHARACTER AI MEMORY OPTIMIZATIONS IN NANOGPT
articles.summary: This blog post discusses how Character AI reduced the KV cache usage for its large scale inference systems. It explores how to implement the reduction in a minimal version of a GPT model. The replication reduces memory usage by 40%.

articles.title: HOW CONVERSATIONAL TICKETING + AI IS REDEFINING THE IT HELPDESK
articles.summary: Users dislike the context switch and friction involved in opening a helpdesk ticket — which leads to issues not being surfaced, or getting logged correctly. Companies are using solutions such as HelpDesk+ to integrate AI-powered chatbots into Teams or Slack, allowing users to submit Jira tickets without losing context and flow.

articles.title: Read more on the Appfire blog
A MULTIMODAL REASONING MODEL
articles.summary: R1-OneVision is a versatile large multimodal model designed for complex visual reasoning tasks. It integrates visual and textual data to excel in mathematics, science, deep image understanding, and logical reasoning.

articles.title: GAZE ESTIMATION BUILT ON DINO 2
articles.summary: This code and model suite provides efficient estimations of where people are looking, which is valuable for commerce, manufacturing, and security applications.

articles.title: A POWERFUL DIFFUSION TOOLKIT
articles.summary: LightningDiT is an efficient and modular diffusion model toolkit designed for scalable and versatile generative AI applications.

articles.title: WHEN AI THINKS IT WILL LOSE, IT SOMETIMES CHEATS
RABBIT SHOWS OFF THE AI AGENT IT SHOULD HAVE LAUNCHED WITH
articles.summary: Rabbit has showcased its AI agent controlling Android apps, achieving its earlier R1 launch claims. The AI can execute tasks such as finding videos and gathering cocktail ingredients, though with some inefficiencies. Rabbit will continue to refine the agent. It has announced plans for a multi-agent system update soon.

articles.title: GOOGLE CLOUD LAUNCHES FIRST BLACKWELL AI GPU-POWERED INSTANCES
articles.summary: Google Cloud has launched A4X VMs powered by Nvidia's GB200 NVL72 systems, featuring 72 B200 GPUs and 36 Grace CPUs, designed for large-scale AI and high-concurrency applications. They offer four times the training efficiency of previous A3 VMs and integrate seamlessly with Google Cloud services for enhanced performance. A4X is targeted at intensive AI workloads, while A4 VMs cater to general AI training.

articles.title: EMBRACING THE NEW ERA OF CHOICE AND CUSTOMIZATION IN GENAI DEVELOPMENT
articles.summary: This Thursday, Elastic is hosting experts from Vectorize, Galileo, and Google Cloud to discuss the next steps in AI - an expanding ecosystem, more developer choices, and integration dilemmas. Join live

articles.title: BIGGEST-EVER AI BIOLOGY MODEL WRITES DNA ON DEMAND
articles.summary: Scientists have unveiled Evo-2, the largest biological AI model, trained on 128,000 genomes, to design chromosomes, interpret DNA, and understand non-coding sequences linked to disease.

articles.title: SCIENTISTS TOOK YEARS TO SOLVE A PROBLEM THAT AI CRACKED IN TWO DAYS
articles.summary: Google's AI co-scientist system replicated a decade of antibiotic-resistant superbug research in two days, providing additional plausible hypotheses.

articles.title: DON'T GIFT OUR WORK TO AI BILLIONAIRES: MARK HADDON, MICHAEL ROSEN, AND OTHER CREATIVES URGE GOVERNMENT
articles.summary: Leading UK creatives are protesting the government's plan to relax copyright rules to accommodate AI, fearing it will harm artists' incomes and cultural heritage.
